script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?\$filter=distributionMethod%20eq%20%27organization%27&\$expand=appDefinitions" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" > /tmp/ex-$$.json; python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/ex-$$.json')); v=d.get('value',[]); print('total:',len(v)); [print(repr(a.get('displayName',''))+' / '+a['id']+' / states='+str([(x.get('publishingState'),x.get('lastModifiedDateTime')) for x in a.get('appDefinitions',[])])) for a in v]"
